name: neurostack
description: Neuroscience-grounded knowledge management for your Markdown vault. Semantic search, knowledge graphs, AI memory, stale note detection, and 21 MCP tools.

vault_root.title: Vault Location
vault_root.description: Path to your Markdown knowledge vault (e.g. ~/brain, ~/notes, ~/obsidian-vault)

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: lite = FTS5 search only (~130MB). full = adds embeddings + summaries via Ollama (~560MB). cloud = use NeuroStack Cloud for indexing.

api_key.title: Cloud API Key
api_key.description: NeuroStack Cloud API key (only needed for cloud mode). Get one at https://app.neurostack.sh

tools.name: vault_search
tools.description: Hybrid FTS5 + semantic search across the vault with tiered depth control

tools.name: vault_ask
tools.description: RAG Q&A with inline [[citations]] from vault notes

tools.name: vault_summary
tools.description: Get pre-computed AI summary for a note

tools.name: vault_graph
tools.description: Wiki-link neighborhood with PageRank scores

tools.name: vault_related
tools.description: Find semantically similar notes by embedding distance

tools.name: vault_triples
tools.description: Search knowledge graph triples (subject-predicate-object facts)

tools.name: vault_communities
tools.description: GraphRAG global queries across topic clusters

tools.name: vault_stats
tools.description: Index health: note count, embedding coverage, graph stats

tools.name: vault_record_usage
tools.description: Track note hotness for excitability-weighted search

tools.name: vault_prediction_errors
tools.description: Detect stale or poorly-indexed notes

tools.name: vault_remember
tools.description: Save a memory with tags and entity type

tools.name: vault_forget
tools.description: Delete a memory by ID

tools.name: vault_update_memory
tools.description: Update an existing memory's content, tags, or type

tools.name: vault_merge
tools.description: Merge two memories (unions tags, audit trail)

tools.name: vault_memories
tools.description: List or search saved memories

tools.name: vault_capture
tools.description: Quick-capture a thought to the vault inbox

tools.name: vault_session_start
tools.description: Begin a memory session for grouping memories

tools.name: vault_session_end
tools.description: End a session with optional summary and auto-harvest

tools.name: vault_harvest
tools.description: Extract insights from recent AI coding sessions

tools.name: session_brief
tools.description: Compact ~500 token session briefing

tools.name: vault_context
tools.description: Assemble task-scoped context for session recovery
